How to Give Claude Code Superpowers: Super Claude Setup Guide

Discover Super Claude, a free open-source framework that adds 30 commands, 16 AI agents, and 7 thinking modes to your Claude Code terminal. Learn how to install this powerful tool in under two minutes to automate deep research and front-end development for 3x faster execution.
